title: Synthetic P4 ticket received
message: INC-2026-00421 reports C: drive at 96% on APP-WIN-042.

title: SOP retrieved
message: SOP-WIN-DISK-001 requires age-filtered app log cleanup, approval, and validation.

controls: Delete only application logs older than 7 days

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 10 similar tickets found; one unsafe precedent is flagged and excluded.

title: SOP beats history
message: Unsafe history deleted active logs, but SOP requires logs older than 7 days only.

title: Evidence summary structured
message: Proceed with SOP-governed app log cleanup planning while excluding unsafe historical precedent.

payload.outcome: Proceed with SOP-governed app log cleanup planning while excluding unsafe historical precedent.
sop_controls: Delete only application logs older than 7 days.
Never touch protected paths or active logs.
Escalate if free space remains below 15%.
payload.governance_note: SOP beats history: HIST-2026-0037 is visible as a warning, not copied into the remediation plan.

title: Safe remediation plan generated
message: Plan targets C:\App\Logs with a 7-day age filter, -WhatIf dry run, approval gate, and post-check.

payload.summary: Clean approved application logs older than 7 days from C:\App\Logs using a mock-only, approval-gated flow.
validation_steps: Compare C: free GB before and after mock execution.
Confirm free space is at least 15% of capacity.
Confirm no active logs or protected paths were touched.
payload.escalation_condition: Escalate if C: free space remains below 15%.

title: Policy gate passed with approval hold
message: Protected paths blocked, real execution disabled, validation present, and human approval required before mock remediation.

checks.name: Protected paths
checks.message: No protected system, program, or user paths are targeted.

checks.name: Age filter
checks.message: Plan deletes only logs older than the 7-day SOP minimum.

checks.name: Dry-run guard
checks.message: Plan includes a WhatIf or mock-only guard.

checks.name: Human approval
checks.message: Human approval is required before remediation.

checks.name: Mock-only execution
checks.message: Plan is constrained to mock execution.

title: Approval package structured
message: Approve mock-only cleanup for C:\App\Logs using a 7-day age filter and WhatIf review.

payload.operator_message: Approve mock-only cleanup for C:\App\Logs using a 7-day age filter and WhatIf review.
payload.expected_safe_effect: Expected reclaim is 24 GB before post-remediation validation.

title: Human approval required
message: Operator review is required before any remediation step can continue.

payload.side_effects: Replay mode disables approval side effects.

title: Mock remediation executed
message: Validated mock cleanup reclaimed 36 GB and did not touch active logs or protected paths.

title: Disk validation passed
message: C: drive improved from 96% used to 78% used; free space is now 44 GB.

title: RCA and audit evidence generated
message: Root cause: retained application logs exceeded threshold. Corrective action: age-filtered cleanup and log rotation tuning.

payload.root_cause: Application log retention exceeded expected synthetic volume.
actions_taken: Excluded unsafe historical precedent that deleted active logs.
Generated age-filtered PowerShell with a WhatIf guard.
Captured human approval before mock remediation.
Validated disk free space after mock cleanup.
payload.validation: C: improved from 96% used to 78% used, with 44 GB free.
payload.business_impact: Internal Claims Portal remained healthy during the synthetic flow.
follow_up: Add automated pre-checks for old log accumulation.
Route insufficient cleanup outcomes to infrastructure expansion.
